languages.text: "Шутите? Вас понял. Братцы говорят, мне чувство юмора в детстве лазганом отстрелило — смеюсь только по приказу вышестоящего". {n}Зарков ухмыляется: из-за сломанной челюсти его улыбка скорее напоминает оскал.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Шутите? Вас понял. Братцы говорят, мне чувство юмора в детстве лазганом отстрелило — смеюсь только по приказу вышестоящего". {n}Зарков ухмыляется: из-за сломанной челюсти его улыбка скорее напоминает оскал.{/n}

languages.text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Шутите? Вас понял. Братцы говорят, мне чувство юмора в детстве лазганом отстрелило — смеюсь только по приказу вышестоящего". {n}Зарков ухмыляется: из-за сломанной челюсти его улыбка скорее напоминает оскал.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

"You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

"You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

languages.text: “您在开玩笑吧？嗯，肯定是的。弟兄们都说，我打小就被激光枪打掉了幽默细胞，除非上头命令我笑，否则我绝不会笑。”{n}扎尔科夫笑了笑，但断裂的下巴让那笑容更像是在龇牙。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您在开玩笑吧？嗯，肯定是的。弟兄们都说，我打小就被激光枪打掉了幽默细胞，除非上头命令我笑，否则我绝不会笑。”{n}扎尔科夫笑了笑，但断裂的下巴让那笑容更像是在龇牙。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est une blague, hein ? Elle est bien bonne. Les gars disent que mon sens de l'humour s'est fait flinguer par un pistolet laser quand j'étais gosse. Je ris uniquement quand on m'en donne l'ordre, » {n}explique Zarkov avec un sourire qui ressemble davantage à un rictus sardonique à cause de sa mâchoire cassée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est une blague, hein ? Elle est bien bonne. Les gars disent que mon sens de l'humour s'est fait flinguer par un pistolet laser quand j'étais gosse. Je ris uniquement quand on m'en donne l'ordre, » {n}explique Zarkov avec un sourire qui ressemble davantage à un rictus sardonique à cause de sa mâchoire cassée.{/n}

languages.text: "Şaka yapıyorsunuz, değil mi? Gerçi haklısınız. Adamlar çocukken espri anlayışımın silazerle vurulup uçurulduğunu söyler. Doğrudan emir almadıkça gülmem." {n}Zarkov gülümsüyor ama kırık çenesi, bunun daha çok bir hırlama gibi görünmesine neden oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şaka yapıyorsunuz, değil mi? Gerçi haklısınız. Adamlar çocukken espri anlayışımın silazerle vurulup uçurulduğunu söyler. Doğrudan emir almadıkça gülmem." {n}Zarkov gülümsüyor ama kırık çenesi, bunun daha çok bir hırlama gibi görünmesine neden oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Está de broma, ¿verdad? Cómo no. Los muchachos dicen que me quitaron el sentido del humor con un rifle cuando era niño. Solo me río si recibo una orden directa para ello». {n}Zarkov sonríe, pero su mandíbula rota hace que parezca una mueca amenazadora.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Está de broma, ¿verdad? Cómo no. Los muchachos dicen que me quitaron el sentido del humor con un rifle cuando era niño. Solo me río si recibo una orden directa para ello». {n}Zarkov sonríe, pero su mandíbula rota hace que parezca una mueca amenazadora.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr macht Witze, oder? Ja, natürlich. Die Jungs sagen, jemand hat mir als Kind mit einem Lasergewehr den Sinn für Humor weggeschossen ... ich lache nur auf direkten Befehl." {n}Zarkovs Lächeln gleicht aufgrund seines gebrochenen Kiefers eher einem Knurren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr macht Witze, oder? Ja, natürlich. Die Jungs sagen, jemand hat mir als Kind mit einem Lasergewehr den Sinn für Humor weggeschossen ... ich lache nur auf direkten Befehl." {n}Zarkovs Lächeln gleicht aufgrund seines gebrochenen Kiefers eher einem Knurren.{/n}

languages.text: 「冗談言ってるの？そうだな。俺のユーモアセンスは子供の頃にラスガンで撃ち抜かれたらしい。命令された時だけ笑うんだ。」{n}ザルコフは笑うが、顎が折れているので、怒っているように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're joking, are you? Right you are. The lads say my sense of humour was shot off by a lasgun when I was a kid — I only laugh when it's a direct order." {n}Zarkov smiles, but his broken jaw makes it look more like a snarl.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「冗談言ってるの？そうだな。俺のユーモアセンスは子供の頃にラスガンで撃ち抜かれたらしい。命令された時だけ笑うんだ。」{n}ザルコフは笑うが、顎が折れているので、怒っているように見える。{/n}
